note: New Trinity section published at website/sost-trinity.html. Full dedicated page in the same green-themed aesthetic as sost-geaspirit.html, ~540 lines, nine sections: hero with live status badge and proof_bundle_sha256 prefix linked to the on-chain TX; //00 what Trinity does and what Trinity is not (anti-hype block); //01 the four pillars (GeaSpirit + Materials Engine + Useful Compute dry-run + SOST capsule rail) with cross-links to each subsystem page; //02 the proof pipeline as a five-step table ending with the Merkle binding algorithm written out in pseudocode; //03 first proof bundle (Kalgoorlie Phase 1) with full on-chain anchor metadata (block #8085, TXID d68678b5..., capsule text trinity-proof kalgoorlie_phase1 3a28a4b112fe95df) and the four-anchor SHA table plus the green-highlighted merkle_root and proof_bundle_sha256; //04 cryptographic guarantees as a six-row property/guarantee/enforced-by table; //05 verify it yourself recipe (git clone, run verifier, sha256sum each anchor, gettransaction on the on-chain capsule); //06 safety model with the five always-present unsafe_or_forbidden anchor actions; //07 roadmap from v0 (shipped) through v1.0 (Pilbara/Zambia non-fallback campaign, dependent on data) with a final note that no planned sprint touches consensus or auto-broadcasts; //08 source and contact with GitHub links to every Trinity design doc and the live bundle JSON. Footer reiterates that Trinity does not claim mineral discoveries, does not list on exchanges, does not promise future value. Index nav updated to surface the Trinity link in green next to GeaSpirit. NO consensus, RPC, node, miner, wallet, or wire-format change.
